recommendations.title: Mary Kom
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of Indian boxer 'Mary Kom' who went through several hardships before audaciously accomplishing her ultimate dream.

recommendations.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
recommendations.overview: When a group of Indian and Pakistani nurses are held hostage in Iraq by a terrorist organization, a renowned Indian secret agent is drawn out of hiding to rescue them.

recommendations.title: The Girl in the Book
recommendations.overview: The story of a young writer's transformation when her past invades her present.

recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Sand Castle
recommendations.overview: Set during the occupation of Iraq, a squad of U.S. soldiers try to protect a small village.

recommendations.title: John Rabe
recommendations.overview: A true-story account of a German businessman who saved more than 200,000 Chinese during the Nanjing massacre in 1937-38.

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.

recommendations.title: Schindler's List
recommendations.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.

recommendations.title: Queen Margot
recommendations.overview: Paris, Kingdom of France, August 18, 1572. To avoid the outbreak of a religious war, the Catholic princess Marguerite de Valois, sister of the feeble King Charles IX, marries the Huguenot King Henry III of Navarre.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.
